item.title: Armed man shot and killed by law enforcement outside Mar-a-Lago
item.description: Law enforcement shot and killed an armed man outside of President Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort Sunday, the Secret Service said. The big picture: The pres...

item.title: Scoop: U.S.-Iran talks expected Friday if Iran sends nuclear proposal
item.description: U.S. negotiators are ready to hold another round of talks with Iran on Friday in Geneva if they receive a detailed Iranian proposal for a nuclear deal...

item.title: JD or Marco? Trump asking advisers about 2028
item.description: President Trump has a new parlor game he's springing on advisers and confidants: JD Vance or Marco Rubio? That is, do people favor the vice president ...

item.title: Faith leaders accuse White House Faith Office of stonewalling them
item.description: Some faith leaders say they're being shut out by the White House Faith Office , alleging the administration provides access only to those in political...

item.title: Lindsey Graham frets that Trump's advisers oppose Iran strike
item.description: Senator Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.) told Axios on Saturday that several people around President Trump are advising him not to bomb Iran . Graham urged the...
